messages.content:
shorten the text below
Wash potatoes thoroughly, then peel. Put the tubers in a saucepan and cover with water. Put on the stove and bring to a boil. Cook on low heat for 30 minutes.
Wash and peel potatoes. Boil in water for 30 mins.

shorten the text below
Prepare dough for dumplings with potatoes. Sift 270 g flour with salt. Mix with eggs, milk and 2 tbsp. l. vegetable oil. Knead a smooth dough, add a little more flour if necessary. Roll the dough into a ball, place in a bowl, cover and leave for 30 minutes.
Make potato dumpling dough: Mix sifted flour, salt, eggs, milk, and oil. Knead and let rest for 30 minutes.

shorten the text below
Onion for stuffing dumplings with potatoes, peel and finely chop. Heat oil in a skillet and sauté onion until golden brown, stirring frequently, about 6 minutes.
Sauté chopped onion until golden brown, around 6 mins.

shorten the text below
Peel and finely chop the onion for filling dumplings with potatoes. Heat a frying pan with vegetable oil and fry the onion until golden brown, stirring frequently, for about 6 minutes.
Sauté chopped onion in oil until golden brown, stirring often, around 6 minutes.
from now every message i send you you should shorten. lets begin
Understood. Please proceed with your message.

Drain the water from the finished potatoes, return the pan to the stove and dry the potatoes a little. Then mash in mashed potatoes with butter. Add the fried onion, season with salt and pepper and mix.
Drain potatoes and dry them. Mash with butter. Add fried onion, salt, and pepper. Mix.
Roll out the dough for dumplings into a thin layer. Cut out of it circles with a diameter of about 7 cm. Arrange the filling in circles, fold them in half and pinch the edges with wet hands.
Roll dough thin, cut 7 cm circles. Add filling and fold in half, pinch edges with wet hands.
Put the dumplings in boiling salted water. When they pop up, cook for another 3 minutes.
Boil dumplings in salted water. Cook for 3 more minutes after they float.

Prepare caramelized onions for serving dumplings with potatoes. Peel and finely chop the onion. Melt butter in a frying pan over medium heat and fry the onion until dark golden brown, 10 minutes. Add sugar and cook, stirring frequently, for another 2 minutes. Remove from heat, transfer to a bowl and leave in a warm place.
Caramelize onions for serving: finely chop and fry in butter until dark golden brown, add sugar and cook for 2 mins. Remove from heat, transfer to a bowl and keep warm.
thank you for your service.
You're welcome! Don't hesitate to ask if you need anything else.
